'''Molavarans''' were a sentient species indigenous to [[Molavar/Legends|Molavar]]. They had caramel colored skin and a long face. Their scalps had multiple tendrils on the sides and back of their head. They bore pointed teeth and large cheek bones.

{{Species-stub}}
